domain.name: accuracy
domain.prompt_hint: Factual correctness vs ground truth / literature.

domain.name: completeness
domain.prompt_hint: All required dimensions addressed; no major omissions.

domain.name: relevance
domain.prompt_hint: Output stays on-scope for the BB paid-brief decision criteria.

domain.name: depth
domain.prompt_hint: Mechanistic + clinical + competitive depth, not surface-level.

domain.name: clarity
domain.prompt_hint: Reader can act on it without re-reading.

domain.name: organization
domain.prompt_hint: Headers, tables, bullets used where they help.

domain.name: conciseness
domain.prompt_hint: No padding. Premium copy, not academic verbosity.

domain.name: critical_analysis
domain.prompt_hint: BB DIFFERENTIATOR. Limitations, failure modes, conflicting evidence.

domain.name: examples_analogies
domain.prompt_hint: Concrete examples (drug, trial, molecule) - not abstractions.

coding.name: correctness
coding.prompt_hint: BB #1 metric for code. Runs without error, returns expected output.

coding.name: efficiency
coding.prompt_hint: Avoids redundant work, uses model.context_managers, parallelizes where it matters.

coding.name: simplicity
coding.prompt_hint: No premature abstraction. Straight-line code where appropriate.

coding.name: error_handling
coding.prompt_hint: BB DIFFERENTIATOR. try/except on file IO, IDs, solver status, NaN checks.

coding.name: clear_io
coding.prompt_hint: Input/output contracts explicit; prints/plots expected results.

coding.name: documentation_comments
coding.prompt_hint: Comments bridge bio reasoning and code steps.

coding.name: biological_mapping
coding.prompt_hint: Variables/functions reflect biology, not just generic Python.

bb_extensions.name: decision_readiness
bb_extensions.prompt_hint: Can a CEO make a go/no-go decision from this brief alone? Yes/no + why.

bb_extensions.name: bb_service_link
bb_extensions.prompt_hint: Does the brief surface a relevant BB service lane (peptide-service, brown-ai-peach, etc.)?

bb_extensions.name: citation_hygiene
bb_extensions.prompt_hint: PMIDs / DOIs / NCT IDs cited inline, not just URLs.
